# adr-forge Domain — Architecture Decision Records

ADR governance tooling: CLI design, MADR template enforcement, markdown parsing strategy, diagnostic output, safe-write semantics, naming conventions, relationship vocabulary, tier classification, and domain management. Covers the adr-forge binary's own architectural decisions as a Rust CLI tool.

Governed by [GOVERNANCE.md](../GOVERNANCE.md).
